headline: Is Tutor Perini Corporation (TPC) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is TPC a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Tutor Perini Corporation on InfoArb Sheets’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on TPC. Tutor Perini Corporation’s share was trading at $77.99 as of June 18th. TPC’s trailing and forward P/E were 53.42 and 14.01 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: AT&T's Copper Exit Plan Faces California Regulatory Resistance As 199,000 Traditional Phone Service Customers Hang In Balance
summary: California asks court, FCC to reject AT&T's request to discontinue copper-wire phone service for new customers.
